✦ About

Data-driven and ready to make an impact

Analytics profile

I bring strong experience across analytics, reporting, and business problem-solving. At HCLTech, I worked with large-scale datasets using Python, SQL, and Excel, built dashboards in Power BI and Tableau, automated recurring reports, and supported decision-making through cohort analysis, A/B testing, regression, and predictive analysis.

I enjoy presenting data in a way that feels polished, practical, and easy to understand. My focus is not just on finding numbers, but on translating them into dashboards, insights, and recommendations that teams can actually use.

✦ Portfolio

Featured analytics projects

Check out some of the case studies I made as a Data Analyst.

🚀 Featured GitHub Case Study

SLA Breach Prevention & Access Governance Analytics

An end-to-end analytics case study focused on reducing SLA breach risk and improving access governance visibility. The project combines Python, SQL, and an interactive dashboard interface to surface operational trends, workload pressure, high-risk access patterns, and decision-ready KPIs.

Python SQLite / SQL Pandas Streamlit Plotly Governance Analytics
  • Tracked SLA %, MTTR, breach patterns, ticket volume, and operational bottlenecks across teams.
  • Flagged inactive users and high-risk access roles to strengthen governance monitoring.
  • Identified workload imbalance as a key driver of SLA pressure and breach risk.
  • Presented a dashboard experience that makes operations, risk, and compliance signals easier to monitor.
🔗 View on GitHub Let’s connect
🌙

Account Dormancy & Reactivation Analysis

Analyzed 12-month inactivity patterns using SQL and Python to identify dormancy drivers, segment inactive accounts, and support targeted reactivation campaigns.

SQL Python Power BI Customer Analytics
  • Identified behavioral patterns behind inactivity and account dormancy.
  • Created Power BI dashboards for account segmentation and reactivation tracking.
  • Supported campaign targeting that contributed to a 7% reactivation uplift.
🏦

Daily Bank Transaction Monitoring System

Built analytics workflows for high-volume banking transaction monitoring, helping teams track exceptions, volume spikes, outliers, and suspicious patterns through automated reporting.

Python SQL Power BI Monitoring
  • Automated transaction extraction, validation, and recurring reporting pipelines.
  • Flagged unusual spikes, outlier activity, and monitoring exceptions for review.
  • Created dashboards to improve compliance, audit, and operational visibility.
📈

Operational KPI & Trend Reporting Dashboard

A reporting initiative focused on making business performance easier to understand through cleaner KPI views, trend analysis, and concise stakeholder-ready summaries.

KPI Reporting Visualization Trend Analysis Stakeholder Reporting
